prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: In the deep, dark ocean, there lived an eight-legged creature named Otto. He was an octopus, but unlike the other octopuses who enjoyed playing games and roughhousing, Otto was very shy. He always hid behind his color-changing tentacles and watched as the other sea creatures swam, sang, and laughed. One day, Otto had an idea. He wanted to make friends and join in on the fun, but he didn't know where to start.
